description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures seated closely together on a rectangular bench-like base, all rendered in a smooth, white stone material. The central figure appears to be female, with two other figures—one on each side—leaning in towards her, suggesting an intimate or emotional scene. The figures are draped in flowing garments that cascade over the bench, with detailed attention given to the folds and contours of the fabric. The base of the sculpture is a solid, rectangular plinth made of a slightly different, more textured stone, providing a sturdy foundation. The overall composition is harmonious, with the figures' postures and gestures creating a sense of unity and connection. The sculpture is finely detailed, with realistic anatomical features and expressive poses.
description: A finely detailed white stone sculpture of three seated human figures on a rectangular plinth, with flowing garments and expressive poses. The figures are closely grouped, creating a sense of intimacy and unity.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three figures seated together, with the central figure facing forward and the others leaning in from each side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures, with the draped garments and the depth of the bench clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the three figures and the full width of the bench, with the drapery flowing down the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, emphasizing the arrangement of the figures and the layered garments.
attribute_subject_matter: three seated human figures in an intimate grouping
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a stone plinth, suggesting it is intended for display in a public or outdoor urban setting.
